page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package implements the Signaling Pathway Impact Analysis which uses the information form a list of differentially expressed genes and their log fold changes together with signaling pathways topology, in order to identify the pathways most relevant to the condition under the study.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package implements the Signaling Pathway Impact Analysis which uses the information form a list of differentially expressed genes and their log fold changes together with signaling pathways topology, in order to identify the pathways most relevant to the condition under the study.
